title: BetterStructures
description: Add structures for any world generation!
body:
# 🟠 Main Features (100% optional and configurable!) * **Add hand-crafted structures to your Minecraft world!** * **Add unique randomly generated [modular dungeons](https://nightbreak.io/plugin/betterstructures/#dungeoneering-modules-free) to your world!** * **Use pre-made packs or build your own with WorldEdit!** * **Fits any world generator.** * **Chests with randomized loot.** * **Optional vanilla mob spawns inside structures.** * **Contains custom props and furniture when used with the [BetterStructures Prop Pack](https://nightbreak.io/plugin/freeminecraftmodels/#betterstructures-prop-pack)** * **Only generates in new chunks.** * **Supports custom items.** * **[EliteMobs](https://nightbreak.io/plugin/elitemobs/) integration** for advanced **boss fights**. * **MMOItems** & **MythicMobs** integrations. * **Fast & lightweight** with **no noticeable server impact** when exploring. * **Want an even better experience?** Works great with [EliteMobs](https://nightbreak.io/plugin/elitemobs/), [Free Minecraft Models](https://nightbreak.io/plugin/freeminecraftmodels/), [Resurrection Chest](https://nightbreak.io/plugin/resurrectionchest/), and [Resource Pack Manager](https://nightbreak.io/plugin/resourcepackmanager/) — all free! > **Important:** Make your own content or **download at least one** of the **free packs** below so structures can start spawning. # 🟠 Requirements & Recommendations * **Required:** [WorldEdit](https://dev.bukkit.org/projects/worldedit) * **Recommended:** * [**EliteMobs**](https://nightbreak.io/plugin/elitemobs/) for boss fights * [**WorldGuard**](https://dev.bukkit.org/projects/worldguard) for region protection * *Note:* EliteMobs-specific packs (**Shrines 1 & 2**, **Caves & Lost Civilizations** Free & Premium) require **EliteMobs**. > ⚠️ **Do not use** [AsyncWorldEdit](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/asyncworldedit.327/) — it **will break** things. # 🟠 How to Setup
Quick setup instructions! | Full permissions list here
# 🟠 Additional downloads

Click here for every free & premium download with more info!

# 🟠 Performance hints
Open performance tips **For normal servers** 1. **Check your server view distance.** This is in `server.properties`. Higher view distances generate exponentially more chunks — a view distance of 40 can result in \~5000 chunks loaded **per player**. **For low‑end servers** 1. **Make sure you have enough RAM.** Rough guideline: **\~3 GB total** available for the server (Minecraft + plugins), not that BetterStructures itself uses that much. 2. **Alternatively, pregenerate your world.** Use a world pregenerator with BetterStructures installed to bake structures into the map. After generation, BetterStructures uses essentially no power. Downside: you can’t add new structure packs to that world without generating a new one (same as vanilla).
# 🟠 View More by Magmaguy!

# 🟠 Partner servers **Matecraft** is the official BetterStructures server! It’s run by me and is **always up-to-date** with the **latest experimental features and new build packs**. Cozy community, dedicated players — come see the plugins as they were designed to work!

elitesurvival.matecraft.org
